examples: This yoghurt has a deliciously creamy flavour.
Lunch was a feast of meat and vegetables, cheese, yoghurt and fruit, with unlimited wine.
Tiffy also eats yoghurt and biscuits after dinner.
Not going to get me flying on something made out of old yoghurt pots!
Probiotics, found in yoghurt or sauerkraut, have been shown to aid your digestive system.
